title: Mistral adds version control for prompts and skills in Studio
friendlyTitle: Mistral makes prompts easier to manage at work
summary: Mistral says Studio now gives enterprise prompts and skills a governed system of record, with versions, ownership, traceability, approval paths, and workspace sharing.
friendlySummary: Mistral Studio now helps teams track and approve changes to prompts and AI skills.
whyItMatters: As prompts become production business logic, teams need the same change-control discipline they use for code. This makes AI behavior easier to audit, improve, and deploy without leaving every change stuck in engineering queues.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps companies know which AI instructions are being used, who changed them, and whether they are safe to put in front of customers.
